theorem statistics_asymptotic_basic_route_package_intro :
  forall (Prerequisite : Prop), forall (Intermediate : Prop), forall (Conclusion : Prop), forall (prerequisite_law : Prerequisite), forall (prerequisite_to_intermediate : Prerequisite -> Intermediate), forall (intermediate_to_conclusion : Intermediate -> Conclusion), @StatisticsAsymptoticBasicRoutePackage Prerequisite Intermediate Conclusion :=
  fun Prerequisite => fun Intermediate => fun Conclusion => fun prerequisite_law => fun prerequisite_to_intermediate => fun intermediate_to_conclusion => fun (P : Prop) => fun (mk : forall (prerequisite_law : Prerequisite), forall (prerequisite_to_intermediate : Prerequisite -> Intermediate), forall (intermediate_to_conclusion : Intermediate -> Conclusion), P) => mk prerequisite_law prerequisite_to_intermediate intermediate_to_conclusion

theorem multivariate_clt_cramer_wold_delta_method_route_derived :
  forall (Prerequisite : Prop), forall (Intermediate : Prop), forall (Conclusion : Prop), forall (package : @StatisticsAsymptoticBasicRoutePackage Prerequisite Intermediate Conclusion), Conclusion :=
  fun Prerequisite => fun Intermediate => fun Conclusion => fun package => package Conclusion (fun (prerequisite_law : Prerequisite) => fun (prerequisite_to_intermediate : Prerequisite -> Intermediate) => fun (intermediate_to_conclusion : Intermediate -> Conclusion) => intermediate_to_conclusion (prerequisite_to_intermediate prerequisite_law))
